'''O-Melie''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]] that was the wife of [[V-Nen]] and the mother of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Olana Chion/Legends|Olana Chion]] (born O-Lana).<ref name="TFFT" />

==Biography==
V-Nen and O-Melie subvertly contacted the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]], which then sent [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and their [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]], to Kegan. However, the leading members of Kegan's government, known as the [[Benevolent Guide]]s, were [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] and could see into the future.<ref name="TFFT" /> They saw Kegan being taken over by [[Masked Soldiers]]<ref name="TFFT" /> and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> They kidnapped Olana and sent her to the [[Re-Learning Circle]] to enforce upon her the ways of [[The Learning]]. However, the Jedi were able to rescue Olana after Kenobi and Tachi managed to get captured and sent to the [[Learning Circle]]. After finding Olana Force-sensitive, the Jedi brought her back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for training, while V-Nen and O-Melie adopted a young orphaned boy by the name of [[V-Davi]] who had escaped with Kenobi and Tachi from the Re-Learning Circle. O-Melie and her husband were part of a covert resistance against their leaders, and after the Jedi exposed what was going on at the Re-Learning Circle, the city's populace peacefully ousted their Benevolent Guides.<ref name="TFFT" />
